notes: Selected from the Task 008.5 corrective screen using hard-target non-regression before aggregate direct score.
The screen tested heart-frozen candidates first; none recovered the hard pump gates, so the Task 008 heart scale is retained and documented as a residual non-superiority limitation.
Pulmonary proximal/distal resistance split is now explicit and raises RPA/LPA pressure without using raw DAo pressure or raw IVC flow as hard targets.
The selected factors keep quasi R/L/C chain scales at 1.0 while exposing chain-specific knobs for later calibration.
Intervention scenarios inherit the same baseline calibration and are not retuned.
